instruction: The Figma logo is too small, colored incorrectly, and has an extra dot beside it. Restore the single balanced outline.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/figma.svg" transform="translate(32, 32) scale(2.6667)" style="color: #a855f7" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M5 5.5A3.5 3.5 0 0 1 8.5 2H12v7H8.5A3.5 3.5 0 0 1 5 5.5z"/><path d="M12 2h3.5a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 0 7H12V2z"/><path d="M12 12.5a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 7 0 3.5 3.5 0 1 1-7 0z"/><path d="M5 19.5A3.5 3.5 0 0 1 8.5 16H12v3.5a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-7 0z"/><path d="M5 12.5A3.5 3.5 0 0 1 8.5 9H12v7H8.5A3.5 3.5 0 0 1 5 12.5z"/></g>
  <circle id="extra-dot" fill="#22c55e" cx="100" cy="32" r="6" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/figma.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M5 5.5A3.5 3.5 0 0 1 8.5 2H12v7H8.5A3.5 3.5 0 0 1 5 5.5z"/><path d="M12 2h3.5a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 0 7H12V2z"/><path d="M12 12.5a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 7 0 3.5 3.5 0 1 1-7 0z"/><path d="M5 19.5A3.5 3.5 0 0 1 8.5 16H12v3.5a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-7 0z"/><path d="M5 12.5A3.5 3.5 0 0 1 8.5 9H12v7H8.5A3.5 3.5 0 0 1 5 12.5z"/></g>
</svg>
